auth.sideTitleSignup: What do I get with an account?

Track order status clearly until delivery

footer.aboutText: Premium natural stones with honest sourcing and craftsmanship.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Call us or leave a message. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.formHint: Share your request. We’ll follow up through your preferred contact method.
contact.note: This form is for inquiry only. For orders, please use the checkout flow and WhatsApp handoff.

hero.title: Our Perspective
hero.body: Our team focuses on supplying and professionally preparing natural stone for the construction industry. We believe choosing the right stone for each project is an important decision; that's why we work to make the path from selection to finishing and delivery clear, reliable, and simple for our customers.
hero.quality: Quality isn't only "good stone." Quality means the right choice, the right finish, precise delivery, and support after purchase.
bullets: Consultation to choose the right stone for the application and space
Standard cutting and finishing for a clean, durable result
Safe delivery with professional packaging and precise scheduling

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A few key services that make the path from selection to delivery easier for projects.

cards.title: Expert Consultation
cards.body: Our specialists, based on your project needs, taste, and budget, recommend the best options so the final choice is more accurate and lower-risk.

cards.title: Cutting & Customization
cards.body: With processing equipment, we can prepare stone based on your required dimensions and design—from cutting and finishing to the details needed for architectural and interior projects.

cards.title: Fast & Safe Shipping
cards.body: Products are shipped with professional packaging and safety standards so stones arrive intact and undamaged—domestically and, when needed, internationally.

cards.title: Project Oversight & Support
cards.body: Our experts support you from selection to final execution, helping ensure the outcome meets expected standards.

cards.title: After-Sales Support
cards.body: Our relationship doesn't end after delivery. If guidance or follow-up is needed, we're here to resolve questions and potential issues.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.before: To turn the stone supply process into an
mission.after: for all customers—from small projects to major construction projects.
